appendix_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Cole Harbour/Westphal
appendix_metadata.title_label_raw: EXISTING INDUSTRIAL USES Notwithstanding anything else in this By -law, the following uses shall be permitted uses to the extent to which they are in existence on the effective date of this By -law, and any expansion or alteration may be considered in accordance with the Municipal P lanning Strategy for Cole Harbour/ Westphal and with the development agreement provisions of the Planning Act.

content_text: APPENDIX B: EXISTING INDUSTRIAL USES Notwithstanding anything else in this By -law, the following uses shall be permitted uses to the extent to which they are in existence on the effective date of this By -law, and any expansion or alteration may be considered in accordance with the Municipal P lanning Strategy for Cole Harbour/ Westphal and with the development agreement provisions of the Planning Act.
